title: 根岸Sの後に・このままどこまで

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara reflects on how much she enjoyed
getting first place in the Negishi Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing she's still as easygoing as ever, I try to put
on the pressure by proposing she enters a
higher-level race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is the G1 February Stakes... However,
Haru Urara is unaffected after hearing the name
and just starts talking about how cool it sounds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel uneasy about Haru Urara's prospects if she
stays so easygoing...
